---
title: "TemplateQMD"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: right
    css: styles/tables.css
    embed-resources: true
    self-contained-math: true
  pdf:
    toc: false
    toc-depth: 3
    echo: false
    css: styles/tables.css
    embed-resources: true
    self-contained-math: true
  docx:
    toc: false
    toc-depth: 3
execute:
  echo: false
bibliography: "(yourbiblio).bib"
---
